urdu transliteration text: Ay Mere Aun-o-muhammad,Ay Mere Aun-o-muhammad
Mujhe Khabar Hai Ke Pyaase, Bohot Ho Tum Mere BêteMagar Tumhari Nigahei(n),Na Jaaye Darya Kinaare
english translation text:
O’ my sons, I am well aware that you are extremely thirsty
But, be mindful that your gaze should not go towards the river banks

urdu transliteration text: Tumhe Pilayengi Paani, Maa Fatemah Lab-e-kausar, Ay Mere Aun-o-muhammad
english translation text: My mother Fatema (AS) will now serve you water on the banks of Kauthar, O’ My Aun and Mohammed

urdu transliteration text: Ay Mere Aun-o-muhammad,Ay Mere Aun-o-muhammad
Tumhe Khabar Hai Ke Mamu, Bohot Zaeef Hai TereSubha Se Leke Abhi Tak, Unho(n) Ne Laashei(n) Uthaaye
english translation text:
You are aware that your Uncle (Imam Hussain AS) has become very weak
From dawn till now, he has been continuously carrying Martyrs

urdu transliteration text: Giro Jo Zee(n) Se To Kehna, Faqat Salaam Ay Dilawar , Ay Mere Aun-o-muhammad
english translation text: But when you fall from your horses, only shout out Salaam to him, O’ My Aun and Mohammed

urdu transliteration text: Ay mere Aun-o-Muhammad,Ay mere Aun-o-Muhammad
Tumhare Maamu Ke Rishte, Mei Jis Tarha Se Hai DilbarAdab Wafa Aur Muhabbat, Wo Aye Tujh Mei Simat Kar
english translation text:
The way that my relation is with your uncle (Hussain)
I pray that you also exemplify the embodiment of respect, loyalty and love

urdu transliteration text: Ye Yaad Ho Ke Ho Dono, Ik Doosre Ke Biraadar, Ay Mere Aun-o-muhammad
english translation text: Remember that you are brothers of one another, O’ My Aun and Mohammed

urdu transliteration text: Ay mere Aun-o-Muhammad,Ay mere Aun-o-Muhammad
Pukaare Aun-o-muhammad, Kalaam Maa Ka Ye SunkarNa Sharm Ayegi Tumko, Na Khof Kar Haaye Madar
english translation text:
After hearing their mother’s advice, Aun and Mohammed cried:
“Do not be afraid, we will not embarrass you O’ Mother,

urdu transliteration text: Ham Is Tarha Se Larenge, Ke Khud Kahenge Ye Haider, Ay Mere Aun-o-muhammad
english translation text: We will fight in such a way, that Haider (AS) will himself say, O’ My Aun and Mohammed”

urdu transliteration text: Ay mere Aun-o-Muhammad,Ay mere Aun-o-Muhammad
Lare The Aisi Tarha Se, Kahe Ye Lashkar-e-kuffaar,Lo Agaye Hai Ye Ran Mei, Ali-o-jaffer-e-tayyaar
english translation text:
They fought so Valiantly that the army of disbelievers said:
“Look, Ali (AS) and Jaffer-e- Tayyar (AS) have entered the battlefield”

urdu transliteration text: Khayaam Se Jo Ye Dekhe, Pukare Fakhr Se Sarwar, Ay Mere Aun-o-muhammad
english translation text: When Imam Hussain (AS) saw this from his tent, he proudly called out, O’ My Aun and Mohammed

urdu transliteration text: Ay mere Aun-o-Muhammad,Ay mere Aun-o-Muhammad
